name: Australia's Sleep Revolution with Dr Michael Mosley
original_name: Australia's Sleep Revolution with Dr Michael Mosley
overview: Medical journalist and chronic insomnia sufferer Dr Michael Mosley puts his body on the line to trial a world-first Australian sleep treatment program being developed by the Flinders University Sleep Institute.

trailers.title: Australia's Sleep Revolution With Dr Michael Mosley | Trailer | 6 March on SBS and SBS On Demand
